name: Cheesy Egg Supper
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cheese spread and milk in a large skillet.
2. Cook over low heat, stirring until the sauce is smooth and bubbly.
3. Stir in the noodles, green onion, eggs, and tomatoes.
4. Cover and cook over low heat for 5 minutes or until heated through.
This is another basic recipe. I have added chopped ham pieces, chopped baloney pieces, chopped green chilies, pimentos, minced onions, very small sieved potato pieces, chopped pecan pieces, and other things.
